purpose: Track public real EC data sources that may help replace source-derived EddyPro parity closures with direct raw-to-final evidence.
truthfulness_boundary: Discovery or downloadable metadata does not change the full EddyPro parity claim gate. A candidate can only replace surrogate closure after download, hash validation, metadata mapping, EddyPro project/settings pairing, official output normalization, raw-to-final parity, and evidence-pack acceptance.

sources.next_action: Keep as the accepted official anchor; do not expand full parity claims until additional real candidates pass the same closure path.

sources.verification_method: Invoke-WebRequest returned HTTP 200 for the NEON API query and HTTP 200 for HEAD on the public HDF5 URL
known_limitations: NEON HDF5 is real EC data, but it is not an EddyPro .ghg/TOB1/SLT raw bundle with paired EddyPro Full_Output.
Requires a new importer/mapping path before it can become a raw-to-final parity fixture.
Download was intentionally not performed in this run because the first verified HDF5 candidate is about 156 MB.
sources.next_action: Add a NEON HDF5 metadata probe/downloader and a small smoke fixture plan before attempting full import.

sources.account_or_registration: not_required_for_landing_page; dataset download path still needs operator review
sources.verification_method: public web search found OSTI dataset 2473255 describing raw high-frequency 10 Hz eddy covariance data from the UIC flux tower
known_limitations: This is real high-frequency EC raw data, but no paired EddyPro project/settings file is registered.
No official EddyPro Full_Output, normalized reference, or acceptance evidence is currently registered.
Use for importer and engineering validation only until the missing EddyPro output pair is supplied.
sources.next_action: Probe and sample the OSTI landing/download path, then build an importer smoke artifact if a repeatable data file URL is available.

sources.provider: British Antarctic Survey Polar Data Centre
sources.account_or_registration: not_required_for_public_landing_page; very large dataset should not be downloaded into git
sources.verification_method: public web search found BAS raw 10 Hz sonic and greenhouse-gas analyser data from a ship-based Arctic cruise
known_limitations: The public record describes a very large raw high-frequency dataset and auxiliary processing scripts, not an EddyPro raw-to-final bundle.
No EddyPro project/settings or official Full_Output reference is registered.
Ship-based motion correction and platform metadata make this useful for importer stress tests, but not for full EddyPro parity claims.
sources.next_action: Use only a byte-range/sample or operator-provided subset for importer stress testing; keep full parity blocked until EddyPro outputs are paired.

sources.verification_method: Invoke-WebRequest returned HTTP 200 for object page and licence page; noninteractive licence_accept redirected back to licence form
known_limitations: No local ICOS authenticated token/session was found.
The object page is discoverable and indicates Raw ASCII, but this run did not obtain a repeatable direct data download.
Even after download, ICOS Raw ASCII still needs EddyPro settings/output pairing or a separately defined raw-to-final validation target.
sources.next_action: Use the ICOS Python package or an authenticated licence-accepted session to download a small object, then normalize metadata and evaluate importer fit.

sources.verification_method: public lead retained from prior fixture search; not downloaded in this run
known_limitations: AmeriFlux/FLUXNET products are valuable processed-flux references, but they generally are not a redistributable high-frequency raw plus EddyPro settings plus Full_Output parity bundle.
Do not use them to claim official EddyPro raw-to-final parity without a complete paired raw/output package.
sources.next_action: Use only as processed-output validation unless a site explicitly publishes high-frequency raw data and EddyPro project/output sidecars.

recommended_next_steps: Keep LI-COR sample data as the current accepted official raw anchor.
Implement a NEON DP4 HDF5 probe/downloader that stores only metadata and optionally byte-range samples first.
Probe CROCUS and BAS landing pages as real raw importer candidates, but do not register them as EddyPro parity fixtures without settings and Full_Output.
Add an ICOS authenticated-download integration only after a reusable noninteractive token/session is available.
Leave full EddyPro field numeric parity blocked until at least one new real candidate completes raw-to-final registration and acceptance.
